scripts.test:a11y: concurrently -k -s first -n serve,a11y "npm:serve" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:5173 && pa11y-ci http://127.0.0.1:5173"
scripts.test: npm run lint:html && npm run lint:css && npm run lint:js && npm run test:a11y
scripts.build:posix: rm -rf dist && mkdir dist && cp -r src/* dist/
scripts.build:win: rimraf dist && mkdir dist && xcopy src dist /E /I /Y >NUL
scripts.build: npm run build:posix || npm run build:win
